executives.name: Alexander C. Karp
executives.background: Dr. Karp is one of our co-founders and has served as our Chief Executive Officer since 2004 and as a member of our Board since 2003. Dr. Karp holds a B.A. from Haverford College, a J.D. from Stanford University, and a Ph.D. from Goethe University in Frankfurt, Germany.

executives.name: Stephen Cohen
executives.background: Mr. Cohen is one of our co-founders and has served as our President since 2020 and as a member of our Board since 2003. He previously served as our Secretary from 2003 to 2020. Mr. Cohen holds a B.S. in Computer Science from Stanford University.

executives.name: David Glazer
executives.background: Mr. Glazer has served as our Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer since 2020. He joined Palantir in 2013 and previously served as our Head of Finance. Prior to joining us, Mr. Glazer was a corporate attorney at Sullivan & Cromwell LLP. Mr. Glazer holds a B.A. from Emory University and a J.D. from Harvard Law School.

executives.name: Ryan Taylor
executives.background: Mr. Taylor has served as our Chief Revenue Officer and Chief Legal Officer since 2022. He previously served as our Chief Legal Officer and Business Affairs Officer from 2020 to 2022. Mr. Taylor joined Palantir in 2010. Mr. Taylor holds a B.S. and M.S. in Management Science & Engineering from Stanford University and a J.D. from Harvard Law School.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Revenue Officer and Chief Legal Officer
Chief Legal Officer and Business Affairs Officer

executives.name: Shyam Sankar
executives.background: Mr. Sankar has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2022. He previously served as our Chief Operating Officer from 2010 to 2022. Mr. Sankar joined Palantir in 2006. Mr. Sankar holds a B.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering from Cornell University and an M.S. in Management Science and Engineering from Stanford University.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Thiel
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Thiel is one of our co-founders and has served as the Chairman of our Board since 2003. He is a technology entrepreneur and investor, co-founding PayPal and serving as its CEO and Chairman. He was also the first outside investor in Facebook. Mr. Thiel holds a B.A. in Philosophy from Stanford University and a J.D. from Stanford Law School.

board_of_directors.name: Alexander C. Karp
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Karp is one of our co-founders and has served as our Chief Executive Officer since 2004 and as a member of our Board since 2003.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Cohen
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Cohen is one of our co-founders and has served as our President since 2020 and as a member of our Board since 2003.

board_of_directors.name: Alexander Moore
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Moore has served as a member of our Board since 2020. He is a Partner at 8VC and was a co-founder of NodePrime. He was also one of the first employees at Palantir. Mr. Moore holds a B.A. in Economics from Stanford University.

board_of_directors.name: Eric Woersching
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Woersching has served as a member of our Board since 2020. He is the Managing Partner of Evolute Capital and was previously a Portfolio Manager at Thiel Macro, LLC. Mr. Woersching holds a B.S. and M.S. in Electrical Engineering from Stanford University.

board_of_directors.name: Lauren Friedman Stat
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Stat has served as a member of our Board since 2020. She previously served in various roles at Accenture for 15 years, including as a Managing Director. Ms. Stat holds a B.S. in Science, Technology, and Society from Stanford University.

board_of_directors.name: Heather Planishek
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Planishek has served as a member of our Board since 2022. She was previously the Chief Accounting Officer of GoDaddy Inc. Ms. Planishek holds a B.S. in Accounting from the University of San Francisco.
